modules.name: SSoT
modules.description: Single Source of Truth document hierarchy

modules.name: Coding Agents
modules.description: Live dashboard for benchmarking and comparing AI coding agents side-by-side. Shows tokens/sec, task completion rates, step timelines, and quality gates per agent. Use it to evaluate OpenHands, Codex, and Claude Code on real tasks before committing to one.

modules.name: Chatbots
modules.description: Build and deploy custom AI chatbots with distinct personalities and behavior profiles. Configure system prompts, model selection, temperature, and response characteristics. Each chatbot can be tailored for specific domains — customer support, creative writing, technical assistance — and shared with the ResonantOS community.

modules.name: Todo
modules.description: Structured task management for tracking work across the ResonantOS system. Create projects, break them into actionable tasks, assign owners and due dates, and track status from open to complete. Integrates with the agent runtime so AI agents can read and update the todo list autonomously.

modules.name: Projects
modules.description: Interactive graph visualization of all ResonantOS projects and their dependencies. Uses Cytoscape.js to render nodes and edges representing projects, their components, and the relationships between them. Rotate, zoom, and inspect any node to understand the system architecture at a glance.

modules.name: Tribes
modules.description: Community organization layer — form or join tribes around shared interests, disciplines, or goals. Each tribe has its own members list, activity feed, and governance rules. Tribes can issue role badges, track member contributions, and collaborate on shared projects within ResonantOS.

modules.name: Bounties
modules.description: Gamified contribution system where community members post bounties — structured tasks with point rewards. Hunters claim bounties, submit work for review, and get rewarded on approval. Bounties can be code, content, research, or design. Point balances are tracked on-chain via the Symbiotic wallet.

modules.name: Protocol Store
modules.description: Marketplace for autonomous protocol agents — each protocol is an NFT that grants access to a specialized AI agent with its own symbiotic wallet, governance rights, and operational domain. Purchase protocols to unlock new capabilities: research agents, creative agents, security auditors, or domain-specific specialists.
